title: Disappearing Presidential Paper Dissolving Message Memo Pad
description:
The Presidential Disappearing Paper has become a staple among certain United States Government Officials. The Spy Paper looks like ordinary paper, but is unique in that it dissolves in just seconds when in contact with liquid! This will result in a useless, non-reconstructable mulch which is far more secured than the output of any standard shredder. Never worry about those exposing the pitfalls of your presidency trying to uncover your secret Russian Relations affairs. The paper is ideal for those confidential notes that may need to "disappear" quickly with little advance notice!
